assessment_objectives.objective: the frequency to assess risk to organizational operations, organizational assets and individuals is defined.
a document in which risk assessment results are to be documented (if not documented in the cybersecurity / data privacy plans or risk assessment report) is defined.

a risk assessment is conducted to determine the likelihood and magnitude of harm from unauthorized access, use, disclosure, disruption, modification or destruction of the system. the information it processes, stores or transmits. and any related information.
personnel or roles to whom risk assessment results are to be disseminated is/are defined.
risk assessment results are disseminated to personnel or roles.
the frequency to update the risk assessment is defined.
the frequency to review risk assessment results is defined.
a risk assessment is conducted to identify threats to and vulnerabilities in the system.
security solutions are identified.
current and accumulated threat intelligence is identified.
Anticipated risk to organizational systems and the organization based on current and accumulated threat intelligence is identified.
the effectiveness of security solutions is assessed frequency to address anticipated risk to organizational systems and the organization based on current and accumulated threat intelligence.
a risk assessment is conducted to determine the likelihood and impact of adverse effects on individuals arising from the processing of Personal Data (PD).
risk assessment results and risk management decisions from the organization and mission or business process perspectives are integrated with system-level risk assessments.
risk assessment results are documented per organization-defined criteria.
risk assessment results are reviewed frequently.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: at least annually and when a significant change occurs

assessment_objectives.objective: the risk assessment is updated frequently or when there are significant changes to the system, its environment of operation or other conditions that may impact the cybersecurity / data privacy state of the system.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: at least annually and when a significant change occurs

assessment_objectives.objective: risk to organizational operations, organizational assets and individuals resulting from the operation of an organizational system that processes, stores or transmits sensitive / regulated data is assessed with the defined frequency.
the risk (including supply chain risk) of unauthorized disclosure resulting from the processing, storage, or transmission of sensitive / regulated data is assessed.
risk assessments are updated per an organization-defined frequency.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters:
at least every 12 months, or when there are significant
incidents or significant changes to risks

assessment_objectives.objective: the risk (including supply chain risk) of unauthorized disclosure resulting from the processing, storage, or transmission of CUI is assessed.
